description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style two-seater sofa upholstered in rich, dark brown leather. The sofa features deep button tufting along the backrest and armrests, giving it a luxurious and traditional appearance. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, adorned with brass nailhead trim for added elegance. The seat consists of two large, loose cushions that appear plush and comfortable. The back and sides are fully upholstered in the same leather, with the backrest maintaining a continuous, gently curved profile. The sofa stands on four short, turned wooden legs, each fitted with small casters for mobility.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield-style sofa with deep button tufting, rolled armrests, and two plush seat cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests with nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled armrest, tufted detailing, and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous leather upholstery and the sofa's gently curved back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and tufted design seen on the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions; backrest and armrests are deeply button-tufted and integrated, with no separate back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, high and rolled armrests at the same height as the backrest, heavily padded with decorative brass nailhead trim.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, turned wooden legs positioned at the corners, each fitted with small casters for mobility; legs are exposed and dark-stained.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and gently curved backrest with deep button tufting; integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a glossy finish and deep button tufting on the backrest and armrests; no visible fabric pattern, but features decorative nailhead trim.
